title: Elbaf’s Children Are in Danger
description: On pages 14–16, this part follows Unknown person #13, Giants, Usopp, Gerd, Unknown person #14, Jarul as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was just those nine... but later on another was...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...taken because he came to save his friends.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You suck, born! How could you say something like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you hear that Ripley! Our Boy sure is somethin'!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: This isn't the time to brag!!

dialogue.speaker: Gerd
dialogue.text: Warriors have no need for schools!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They don't need libraries or their pointless history either!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Set them AbLaze and swear your allegiance to us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're going to kill your kids off one by one.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The hell did he just say?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We know where the kids are, let's go save them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This school is a symbol of Elbaf's Peace!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the library not only safeguards our long history...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But also the secrets of the world that the scholars of ohara sacrificed their lives to protect!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It doesn't just belong to Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You sure are a big mouth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'm not going to let it happen!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: An unlikely duo springs into action!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
